# Tour Proposal — Highlands & Coast, 5-Day Private Tour (Scotland)

## Overview

A 5-day private guided tour of the Scottish Highlands and west coast for the Marlowe family (2 adults,
2 teenagers), departing Edinburgh on 12 September 2026. Mid-range budget, no mobility constraints, one
vegetarian traveler. The pace is moderate — two driving legs balanced against half-day walks and a
boat trip. Guests rated our 2025 Highlands itinerary 4.8 of 5 (source: 2025 post-tour survey)[^survey].

## Itinerary

- **Day 1** — Edinburgh pickup 09:00; drive to Stirling Castle (arrive 10:30, castle opens 09:30).
  Lunch in Callander, on to Glencoe; overnight Fort William.
- **Day 2** — Morning walk in Glen Nevis; afternoon drive to the Isle of Skye via the Glenfinnan
  Viaduct (Jacobite steam train viewpoint, 13:15 crossing). Overnight Portree.
- **Day 3** — Full day on Skye: Old Man of Storr walk and Fairy Pools. Overnight Portree.
- **Day 4** — Boat trip from Elgol (10:00 departure, 3 hours); afternoon drive to Loch Ness.
  Overnight Inverness.
- **Day 5** — Culloden battlefield (opens 09:00), then return to Edinburgh; drop-off by 17:30.

Driving legs are kept under 3 hours each; all attraction arrivals fall inside published opening hours.

## Inclusions

- Private driver-guide for all 5 days.
- 4 nights mid-range hotels, breakfast included.
- Stirling Castle and Culloden admissions; Elgol boat trip.
- Vegetarian options confirmed at every dinner stop.

Excluded: lunches, travel insurance, and personal expenses.

## Pricing

Per-party total for the 5-day private tour (GBP):

<!-- reconcile -->
- Driver-guide (5 days): 1,750
- Accommodation (4 nights, family rooms): 1,480
- Admissions and boat trip: 320
- Vehicle, fuel, and tolls: 450
- Total package price: 4,000
<!-- /reconcile -->

The package is priced about 15% below our 2025 comparable tour (source: internal rate sheet)[^rates].

## Safety & Cancellation

- **Insurance:** travel and medical insurance is required and not included; we provide a quote on
  request through our partner broker.
- **Cancellation:** free cancellation up to 30 days before departure; half the package refunded
  30–14 days before; no refund inside 14 days. Weather-related boat-trip cancellations are refunded in
  full.
- **Advisories:** west-coast ferry and boat schedules are weather-dependent; we hold a flexible Day 4
  inland alternative. No current UK travel advisory affects this route.

## Sources

[^survey]: Marlowe Travel 2025 post-tour guest survey, n=212, fielded December 2025.
[^rates]: Internal supplier rate sheet, Scotland private tours, dated 2026-04-01.
